name: Figurine of Wondrous Power: Ivory Goats
description: These ivory statuettes of goats are always created in sets of three. Each goat looks unique and functions differently from the others.

properties.activation_type: throw to a point on the ground within 60 feet

special_features.removable_horns: Magic action to remove; one horn becomes +1 Lance, other becomes +2 Longsword; weapons disappear when goat reverts
special_features.fear_aura: Any Hostile creature that starts its turn within 30-foot Emanation originating from the goat must succeed on DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or have Frightened condition for 1 minute. Frightened creature repeats save at end of each of its turns. Once a creature succeeds, it's immune to this effect for 24 hours.

variants.name: Goat of Traveling
variants.charges_cost: 1 charge per hour or portion thereof
